title: Eria suborbicularis
taxonomy: Eria suborbicularis is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Eria, which is a group of terrestrial orchids native to tropical and subtropical regions. The species Eria suborbicularis is further classified into the section Eria, which is characterized by its small, delicate flowers. The species is known to be endemic to certain regions, indicating its unique distribution and limited geographical range. Further classification may include its rank in the botanical hierarchy, such as species, genus, family, order, class, and kingdom.

The medicinal uses of Eria suborbicularis are primarily based on traditional knowledge and may include the treatment of various health conditions such as fever and inflammation.
